name: QA 1188
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1188

Test pmdadm VDO (Virtual Data Optimizer) metrics with valgrind.



Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1188

Test pmdadm VDO (Virtual Data Optimizer) metrics with valgrind.

Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1188

Test pmdadm VDO (Virtual Data Optimizer) metrics with valgrind.



Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce
